title: Signed Spectral Clustering Recovery on Synthetic Planted-Synergy Data
summary: Demonstrates SPONGE signed spectral clustering on a synthetic planted-synergy dataset (easy_2mod_xor: 500 samples, 10 features, 2 XOR modules). Computes Co-Information matrix using custom KSG MI estimator, runs SPONGE_sym with auto-k and oracle-k selection, and compares against 3 baselines (hard thresholding, unsigned spectral, random partition). Reports ARI, module-focused ARI, synergistic pair Jaccard, and XOR recovery fraction. Key result: SPONGE perfectly recovers XOR modules (Jac=1.0, XOR=1.0) while random partition fails (Jac=0.0). Includes CoI heatmap and method comparison bar chart. Runtime: 0.7s.
